originalTitle: 'I sold it for over £1k': Why people want new Swatch
summary: The launch of an exclusive pocket watch has sparked a frenzy that forced stores worldwide to close and in some cases saw police officers and security deal with huge unruly crowds.
content: The launch of an exclusive pocket watch has sparked a frenzy that forced stores worldwide to close and in some cases saw police officers and security deal with huge unruly crowds.
chineseTitle: “我把它卖了超过 1000 英镑”：为什么人们想要新的 Swatch
chineseSummary: 一款独家怀表的推出引发了一场狂热，迫使世界各地的商店关门，在某些情况下，警察和保安人员与大量不守规矩的人群打交道。
chineseContent: 一款独家怀表的推出引发了一场狂热，迫使世界各地的商店关门，在某些情况下，警察和保安人员与大量不守规矩的人群打交道。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
